data.title: Bitcoin Miner Bitdeer Boosts War Chest With New Convertible Notes Deal
data.description:

He went on Truth Social as per usual to say: “Too Late Powell is costing our […]

data.title: JP Morgan Executive Warns of ‘Overcrowding’ in Stablecoin Market Amid JPMD Trademark Filing
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, June 19, 2025- A JP Morgan executive expressed concerns over the growing fragmentation and potential “overcrowding” in the stablecoin market as the bank recently filed a trademark for JPMD, hinting at plans to launch its own digital currency. Emma Lovett, executive director overseeing JP Morgan’s markets distributed ledger technology and credit efforts, spoke […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/jp-morgan-executive-warns-of-overcrowding-in-stablecoin-market-amid-jpmd-trademark-filing

data.title: New Crypto Bubble? Research Warns About Public Firms Hoarding BTC, ETH, and SOL
data.description:
TL;DR Over 220 companies now operate as crypto treasuries, raising capital to accumulate Bitcoin and other assets without using collateral. Of the $44 billion raised by 12 firms, only a third was debt-financed, and 87% of that debt is unsecured, according to Presto Research. Analysts warn that this growing concentration could undermine Bitcoin’s appeal as. . .

data.title: A whale withdrew 303.36 BTC from Deribit 6 hours ago, worth about 31.66 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale withdrew 303.36 bitcoins from Deribit 6 hours ago, worth about 31.66 million US dollars. In the past week, the whale has withdrawn a total of 1,303.35 bitcoins from Deribit, worth about 137.52 million US dollars.

data.title: Solana Price Prediction: Stuck in the $140s — What’s Holding SOL Back from Breaking Out?
data.description:
The Solana price has fallen to $145 today, with ongoing tensions in the Middle East causing the altcoin to erase most of the gains it made at the start of the week.SOL is now down by 8% in a week and by 13% in the past month, with the coin having traded more or less between $140 and $160 since the end of May.The coin had been threatening to consolidate above $160 up until June 12, when Israel conducted its first airstrikes against Iran, triggering a conflict which threatens to escalate further.However, such macro conditions do not affect Solana’s fundamentals, with the coin and its blockchain looking forward to significant developments this year, boosting its long-term price prediction
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/solana-price-prediction-stuck-in-the-140s-whats-holding-sol-back-from-breaking-out-solx/

data.title: Revealed: The Trump Family’s Huge Profits from Crypto
data.description:
Donald Trump made almost $60 million from crypto last year — and that's before he launched his controversial meme coin.
source: https://cryptonews.com/exclusives/revealed-the-trump-familys-huge-profits-from-crypto/

data.title: KuCoin Taps BitGo in $2B ‘Trust Project’ to Shield Clients With Off-Exchange Custody
data.description:
KuCoin Taps BitGo Singapore through the Go Network, a step that has advanced its $2 B Trust Project, giving institutions off-exchange settlement across spot, options and futures. Trades occur without pre-funding as assets stay in regulated custody with $250 M cover, cutting counterparty risk.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/kucoin-taps-bitgo-2b-trust-project-custody/

data.title: Analyst says bitcoin’s $100,000 level is ‘being cemented as the base price’ for investors
data.description:
"$100k isn’t just support anymore — it’s being cemented in investors’ minds as the base price," said Nic Puckrin, founder of The Coin Bureau.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/358895/analyst-says-bitcoins-100000-level-is-being-cemented-as-the-base-price-for-investors?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: KyberSwap: Plans to delist ZKsync Era from aggregators starting July 1
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Kyber Network published a statement on the X platform stating that it will remove ZKsync Era from the aggregator starting July 1, 2025. After the removal takes effect, the KyberSwap aggregator will continue to support 15 main chains including Ethereum mainnet, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, etc. It is reported that this update only affects the KyberSwap aggregator, and the cross-chain function still supports ZKsync Era normally.

data.title: BlackRock Acquires Over $750 Million in Ethereum Without Selling
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Arkham has announced that BlackRock has purchased more than $750 million worth of Ethereum in June. The investment firm has reportedly not sold any of its holdings during this period.

data.title: Arkham: BlackRock has bought more than $750 million worth of ETH in June
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arkham posted on the X platform that BlackRock had purchased more than $750 million worth of ETH in June this year and had not sold it.
